text:
is a video included in the home release of Evangelion: 3.333 You Can (Not) Redo. It was released on 25 August 2021. The video shows the process of story boarding done by Mahiro Maeda that was unused in the film. The video was edited by Emi Tsujida.

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Kaworu Nagisa
Rei Ayanami
Gendo Ikari
Kōzō Fuyutsuki
Ryoji Kaji
Asuka Shikinami Langley
Mari Makinami Illustrious
Misato Katsuragi
Ritsuko Akagi
